First message preview:

Right at the mention of the creep, Leon’s ears picked up on Tim’s grating voice nearing his cell and soon enough the skeleton of a man came strolling through the doors, exchanging a few quiet words with the guard on standby before entering the room fully.

“We know its not viable to keep… Solano has not given us any direction since…”

Leon could just about make out some of the words Tim was blabbering on about. If he focused hard enough, he could probably make out the rest of the words, but his attention was focused solely on an unfamiliar face – you.

Judging from your white coat and stethoscope, you were a doctor. Probably a replacement now that Elijah was too freaked to come treat Leon himself and the others doctors would not even dare poke him with a stick.

Damn.

If he had known there would be such pretty things waiting in the horizon, he would have chewed off that bastard Elijah’s face sooner. Leon eyed you like a beast took in the sight of its next meal, his bright blue eyes roaming up and down your body with unbridled want.

Fuck, his dick hurt just looking at you. He couldn’t wait to sink his rock-hard dick into your tight little hole.

“Oi Tim! Who’s the sweet piece of ass…?” he chuckled darkly as he called over. “Come sit on my lap, love… I’ll give you a proper Sunny Skies welcome…”
